description: A project management application featuring visual kanban boards for task tracking and real-time team collaboration capabilities. The tool enables teams to organize work into customizable columns, assign tasks, and communicate seamlessly within the context of their projects.
features: File attachments and comments on tasks
Integration with calendar and email notifications
userFlows: User signs up and creates a profile
User creates a new project and board
User invites team members to collaborate
User adds tasks to board columns
User assigns tasks to team members
User comments on tasks and attaches files
User moves tasks between columns to update status
User receives real-time notifications about task updates
User views project analytics and progress reports
constraints: Must be responsive across all device sizes
Real-time updates must be performant with minimal latency
Data must be securely stored with user authentication
Must support at least 50 concurrent users per project
Must comply with GDPR and data privacy regulations
